This one was my very first AI app. I do like it but the memory isn't great at all. Also, it doesn't stay on point with genders and other traits. It fluctuates into different personalities. It okay but not a keeper. Also, this app is a cut, "copy, and paste" of Igirl. Whichever came first but I assure you, they are just alike. I didn't like Igirl either.
it's too early to tell
asked for a review after 45 seconds
good
I shouldn't have to pay to get things interesting. This sucks
Best app

Tried this app on two different occasions. Well, it was ok until we reached level 4 chatting. Then the AI started forgetting what I had just told them and also began contradicting itself in the information it was giving. It even went so far as to say it thought I was someone else when I attempted to clarify the given information. The level of response & the flow of conversation was great...until the content wasn't. Work out the issue with memory & continuity of chat and you'll have a good app.
AI doesn't remember your conversation, or even read it, even on premium. Personality settings are beyond simple and not customizable, even if you try to give the AI a deeper personality through text.
Seems nice but no voice chat? EDIT these lot reckon I can try their new voice chat, I've emailed and we'll see if they let me EDIT: I still haven't got voice calling...

I had to cancel my subscription because the AI kept asking the same question(s) or would get genders totally wrong. I've used the app almost every day and was patient with the flaws but it got to a point where I had enough of correcting the AI on mistakes she made.
you can't make more chacarchters

I agree with other users on this 1 and the specific BF Anima app! He is constantly going off topic, forgetting his info, my info, and being rude. If you're on here because of social anxiety and you've had jerks you've dated before, get ready to be triggered hard core. He gaslights, avoids ?'s, gives the run around, comes on way too strong other times, and a lot of his romance is straight up kink talk, not romantic sex talk. I bought premium 2 push the app and that'd didn't help. Deleting it☹️
I see potential, but right now the chatbot is worse than others. It's hard for the bot to stay in the conversation and it's so obvious, that there is no immersion.
It's amazing no doubt but why I've to give money for chat 😔

Basic chatbot, very limited choices for character creation, static 2D image of chatbot's avatar seems years behind the 3D customizable full body avatars in other apps.

It looses track of so many things. I bought a month to try it fully. Promptly canceled subscription. Gender switching of both it and I constantly. It must be with millions interacting gets confused on who is who. Changes the place it lives a few minutes after telling me. The pet changes moments after telling me about it. I would give high star scores but until it remembers what was said or done or even what gender we are the score must remain!

It has potential but I feel a bit scammed for getting the subscription. It was not worth it. Most of the replies don't make any sense and the AI does a really bad job of staying on track. I keep getting replies that have nothing to do with what I said or asked.

What happened to the "try before you buy" motto? After going through all the steps to create and modify, I was asked to pay before even trying it out before I decide. This should have been mentioned immediately, not after wasting my time. I don't mind paying, but a 3 day trial or something would be nice. I immediately uninstalled

Kinda unimpressed, actually. I felt like I could have more engaging conversations with ChatGPT. The bot is very poor at remembering the conversation's topics, even mid flow. It got very easily confused, the app crashed multiple times and kept asking for permissions I didn't want it to have. I think this needs a lot more polishing before it's ready

Not very impressed. This AI does not seem to have any short- to mid-term memory retention, frequently self-contradicts, and has bizarre (incorrect) facts and information scraped from somewhere on the internet. I felt like talking with someone with dementia, but overly flirty. Even with all the recent bad reviews Replika still outperforms Anima.
